description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular double-sided metal head, featuring a dark, weathered finish and visible rivets along the central band. The head is constructed from solid metal, with slightly beveled edges and a central section reinforced by a darker metallic plate and gold-toned rivets. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark brown, ribbed grip that appears to be made of wood or a composite material, and capped with a black, reinforced pommel. The overall design is industrial and utilitarian, suggesting it is built for high-impact tasks such as demolition or heavy construction. The hammer shows some surface scuffing and discoloration, indicating prior use or intentional weathering for realism. No visible branding or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A rugged, double-sided sledgehammer with a weathered metal head, riveted central band, and a ribbed dark brown handle capped with a reinforced black pommel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the rectangular metal head, central riveted band, and the ribbed handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the flat striking face of the hammer and the thickness of the head, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite face of the head and the same central riveted band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the flat striking face and the thickness of the head, similar to view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood, wrapped with ribbed dark brown grip for enhanced hold, capped with a black reinforced pommel.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular double-sided sledgehammer head, solid steel, with beveled edges and a central riveted band for reinforcement.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible scuffing, discoloration, and minor surface scratches on the metal head.
